case_title: SUNTRUST BANK VS. SCOTT D. PERKINS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNTRUST BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERKINS, SCOTT D. MONIER, KATHRYNE J. $200,622.97 PRINCIPAL, $2,638.20 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $203,671.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
